title: olearia rufa
intro: Olearia rufa, also known as red daisy bush, is a flowering shrub native to eastern Australia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Olearia rufa are said to include reducing inflammation and improving immune function, as well as exhibiting potential antimicrobial and antiviral activities. Olearia rufa is typically prepared as an infusion or tincture, and is sometimes used in combination with other herbs for enhanced medicinal effects.
